curation_notes: Pre-assigned as buffer-overflow from CWE-119, but the advisory title is 'Integer overflow in base64' and the description explicitly states 'integer overflow bug when calculating the size of a buffer'. The patch replaces unchecked arithmetic with checked_add and checked_mul in the encoded_size function. Reclassified to integer-overflow. Primary location is the encoded_size function in src/lib.rs which performs the unchecked arithmetic. The callers encode_config and encode_config_buf were also patched to handle the new Option return type, but the root vulnerability is the overflow in encoded_size. No sibling files contain the same pattern — src/tables.rs only holds static lookup tables.
